nits.issue: composio.trigger.disabled handler is log-only — spec asks to mark composio_triggers inactive + alert. Schema lacks `active` column; deferred to a follow-up.
Attaches to globally most-recent open run, not the affected workspace. Could surface in an unrelated workspace's timeline.
trigger_index hardcoded to 0 (we don't know which automation.triggers[] index produced the event).
Race: concurrent webhooks can both INSERT duplicate ad-hoc agents. Pre-existing pattern in D.3.
Declared `routed` return type doesn't include the `routed: boolean` field that routeTriggerMessage actually returns. Type contract minor lie; doesn't affect runtime.
`${JSON.stringify(v)}::jsonb` matches codebase convention; project memory prefers sql.json().
If cloud_runs INSERT succeeds but SQS fails, pending run is orphaned. Logged, not retried. Follow-up: stuck-runs reaper.
Tries 4 locations without logging which one matched. Adding a debug-log on first match would speed up live debugging.
